data.title: FETV Answers the Call with Car 54, Where Are You?
data.description: A popular sitcom is set to make its debut on May 5th in South Bend, Indiana. FETV (Family Entertainment Television), a network known for showcasing cherished TV shows and movies, revealed the news on April 28, 2026. The show in question, Car 54, Where Are You?, will be available to viewers through cable, satellite, and virtual platforms. Don't miss the premiere of this classic sitcom featuring humor and nostalgia.

data.title: MNA: Boston City Council to Vote on Resolution Supporting Brigham Nurses as they Hold Informational Picket on April 29
data.description: In the fiscal year 2024, the highest-ranking officials at MGB earned a combined total of $35.9 million. Despite this, Brigham and Women's Hospital (BWH) nurses were not offered any salary increases and important patient care services were discontinued. In response to this disparity, the nurses at BWH are advocating for a just contract. This news broke on April 28, 2026 in Boston, coinciding with a planned informational picket by the nurses.

data.title: S&P Cotality Case-Shiller Index Reports Annual Gain in February 2026
data.description: In February 2026, the S&P CoreLogic Case-Shiller U.S. National Home Price NSA Index showed a 0.7% increase compared to the previous year, slightly lower than the 0.8% growth recorded in the preceding month. Over 50% of the significant metropolitan markets in the United States experienced a drop in prices on a yearly basis during February. Specifically, Denver saw a decline of 2.2%, standing out as one of the markets with decreasing home prices.

data.title: Fosun Pharma Announces Q1 2026 Results: Net Profit Attributable to Shareholders After Deducting Non-Recurring Gains and Losses Increased by 21.96% YoY, With Strong Pipeline Execution
data.description: Shanghai, April 28, 2026 - Today, Fosun Pharma released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The Company, listed under stock codes 600196.SH and 02196.HK, reported a total revenue of RMB 10,073 million during this period.

data.title: I Squared Capital Announces Expansion of its Data Center Franchise in Latin America with the Acquisition of Elea Data Centers, a Leading Brazilian Platform
data.description: In a recent development, I Squared Capital, a prominent global infrastructure investment manager, has confirmed the acquisition of Elea Data Centers, a major carrier-neutral data center platform in Brazil. Elea currently manages nine interconnected data center campuses throughout Brazil, encompassing key cities such as São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, and Brasília. The company caters to a wide range of enterprise and hyperscale clients, further solidifying its position within the market. This strategic acquisition signifies a significant move within the industry, showcasing the growing importance of data infrastructure in the region.

data.title: Maryland Broadband Cooperative Celebrates 20 Years of Building the Backbone of Connectivity
data.description: In Salisbury, Maryland, a milestone is being celebrated as the Maryland Broadband Cooperative (MdBC) marks 20 years since its inception. Established in 2006 as a 501(c)(12) organization, MdBC has been instrumental in constructing and managing the middle-mile fiber network that acts as the crucial foundation for broadband access throughout the state. This infrastructure plays a vital role in connecting communities and businesses, contributing to enhanced connectivity and technological advancement in Maryland.
